_comment: Mutation testing for the core package. Stryker has no first-party Bun runner, so we use the command runner that delegates to `bun test`. Slow — designed to run nightly or under a label, not on every commit.
_comment_ignore: ignorePatterns controls files COPIED to the sandbox; tests must be copied so the runner can execute them. Only exclude truly heavy directories.
_comment_thresholds: Lifted from break=0 to break=55 — the suite measured 65.63% on the full core. We want regressions under 55% to fail the gate (release-check.sh, step 7). Targeted per-file goals are tracked in BACKLOG.md.
